title: Argos
content:

A [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="Death Cloud" /> [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="Jedipedia-NPCData" /> with pale skin, orange [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and gray-brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]] cut close in a [[Double stripe|striped pattern]], '''Argos''' had achieved the rank of [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] in the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|resurgent Empire]]<ref name="Death Cloud" /> by the year [[3640 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> Argos was proficient in the use of [[Force blast]]s and [[Force lightning/Legends|lightning]] in conjunction with their red-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], and they wore a [[Breath mask/Legends|respirator mask]] and [[Sith apparel|armored robes]] in combat.<ref name="Death Cloud" />

As the [[Galactic War]] broke out with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Argos was sent to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] under the [[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor's]] servant, the corrupted [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tol Braga]]. There, as the [[Battle of Corellia]] raged across the world, Argos and several [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Masters]] were sent to the [[Saxan Chemical Refinery]] accompanied by over a dozen [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]] and [[Sith Warrior|warriors]] in order to create a chemical bomb that would [[Death/Legends|kill]] millions. However, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] known as the [[Hero of Tython]] attacked the refinery in order to stop the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], and Argos was killed by the Knight during the battle.<ref name="Death Cloud" />

==Behind the scenes==
Argos appeared as an Elite NPC enemy during the Jedi Knight class mission "Death Cloud" on Corellia, in the [[2011]] [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online role-playing video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' developed by [[BioWare]] and [[LucasArts]].<ref name="Death Cloud" />
